_README: This is a SANITIZED example profile. Replace every placeholder with your own data. All personal contact info, university, and GPA are fictional.

personal.name: Your Name

bullets: Led a team under pressure, delivering mission-critical results on tight timelines.
Coordinated across multiple functions with strong communication and problem-solving.

personal.volunteering: One-line volunteering description (use format: 'Volunteering: <what you did>').

banned_tools: List tools you do NOT know — the AI will never inject these into your CV
skills.currently_learning_note: Do not include in CV unless job requires it.

bullets.rtl_verification: Implemented 11 RTL modules in Verilog; executed 3 testbenches covering 6 scenarios; debugged all functional issues.
bullets.flow: Ran full RTL2GDS flow with Cadence Genus/Innovus; achieved GDS streamout on 45nm.
bullets.signoff: Clean STA/DRC/LVS/PEX signoff: 102.3 MHz, WNS +222ps, 7,519 cells, 0 violations.

bullets.design: Designed 6 CMOS circuits from transistor level through full DRC/LVS/PEX signoff.
bullets.corners: Corner analysis across 5 PVT corners and 100 Monte Carlo runs — 97% yield.
bullets.debug: Identified and resolved slew-rate limitation in op-amp via Fingers technique.

projects.name: FPGA Machine-Learning Accelerator (Example)
projects.tools: Xilinx FPGA board, Vitis AI, PyTorch

bullets.deploy: Quantized model FP32 to INT8 (73% size reduction); deployed on FPGA SoC at 10-12 FPS.
bullets.debug: Resolved preprocessing bug causing 100% false detection via systematic root-cause analysis.

_usage_notes: Every bullet should include at least one number — the QA agent enforces this.
Keep 'banned_tools' honest — the system will never claim you know a tool listed here.
